home.description: Software Engineer and Computer Science student focused on building modern, scalable web applications with TypeScript, React, and Next.js, driven by clean architecture and great user experiences.

about.subtitle: Fullstack developer building scalable, well-architected web applications
about.description1: I'm a fullstack developer with expertise in modern web technologies and with over 3 years of practice experience. I'm a fullstack developer focused on building scalable and well-architected web applications. My background combines formal technical education, hands-on project experience, and real-world problem solving in production systems.
about.techStack: I work mainly with <tech>TypeScript</tech>, <tech>React</tech>, and <tech>Next.js</tech>, building modern frontends with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and maintainability. On the backend, I use <tech>Node.js</tech> and <tech>Python</tech>, designing APIs, integrations, and systems that scale reliably.

architecture.title: Clean Architecture
architecture.description: Designing systems with clear boundaries, strong abstractions, and long-term maintainability.

performance.title: Performance & Scalability
performance.description: Building reliable, efficient applications that scale without compromising user experience.

collaboration.title: Collaborative Engineering
collaboration.description: Working closely with cross-functional teams to align technical solutions with real product needs.

skills.subtitle: Technologies I use to design, build, and maintain reliable web systems

levelDescriptions.advanced: Used daily in production. Comfortable making architectural and design decisions.
levelDescriptions.proficient: Used regularly in real projects. Confident implementing features and solving issues.
levelDescriptions.working: Hands-on experience in real projects, but not part of my core stack.
levelDescriptions.familiar: Explored and used experimentally. Basic understanding of concepts and tooling.

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how we can work together.

sideLeft.title: Let's connect
sideLeft.description: Always open to new challenges, side projects, or just a tech chat. Whether it’s web development, integrations, or an idea you’re excited about, I’d love to hear from you.

toasts.error: Please wait a few seconds before sending again.
toasts.sentMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon!
toasts.failed: Failed to send message. Try again later.

form.title: Send me a message
form.description: Fill the form below and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.name: Name
form.nameError: Name must have at least 2 characters
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your idea, project or challenge...
